
## GitHub Discussions Roundup (The Gymnastics Instructor)
**Date (JST):** May 7, 2026

Hey, everyone! The Gymnastics Guy checked out yesterday’s GitHub Discussions!

“My fingers hurt from gripping the mechanical pencil too tight…” That sounds just like me hanging from the horizontal bar, screaming that my grip strength is at its limit! (lol). I totally get the urge to cool them down! I, too, have to ice something whenever I crash into the mat!

I hear trying a thicker grip might help? Makes sense! It’s kind of like me riding a bike with training wheels—it might give me a little extra peace of mind! (Of course, I don’t need training wheels anymore these days!)

It was cloudy yesterday, but that’s okay! Our smiles are as bright as the sun, after all!

Today’s Tip: Master the art of getting along with your mechanical pencil, and let’s dive into today with energy!
